title: Comprehensive 2026-2030 Enterprise & Civilizational AGI/ASI Governance, Architecture, Safety & Implementation Master Blueprint for G-SIFI Financial Institutions and Regulators
classification: Confidential / Restricted — Board, CRO, CCO, CISO, CDAO, Group Internal Audit, External Regulators, AISIs, Cryptographic Supervisory Authorities

directive.scope: Master end-to-end blueprint for G-SIFI financial institutions and their regulators covering: (1) Sentinel AI v2.4 and WorkflowAI Pro reference architectures; (2) institutional AI governance and control platforms on Kubernetes+Kafka+OPA; (3) 28-regime multi-framework regulatory compliance with EU AI Act Annex IV conformity dossiers; (4) Sentinel Enterprise AGI Containment Stack with AGI containment labs, TLA+/Coq/Q# governance kernels, Unified Meta-Invariant Framework (UMIF), zero-trust Kubernetes/OPA/Kafka WORM audit, ZK/zk-SNARK + PQC, zero-knowledge systemic-compliance proofs, GIEN telemetry + protocol, CRS-UUID lineage, sanctions execution; (5) regulator-grade supervisory and reporting stack with AI Governance Hub, GQL/sGQL/R-SGQL, ARRE, verification-based AI supervision, CAS + CAS-SPP, SR-DSL, Annex IV dossiers; (6) enterprise AI strategy + prompt management + agent interoperability (EAIP) + autonomous agents; (7) phased 2026-2030 implementation roadmap; (8) systemic-risk controls and civilizational AGI readiness best practices
outcomes: Sentinel AI v2.4 + WorkflowAI Pro reference architectures deployed across all material AI systems by 2028
ISO/IEC 42001 certified AIMS with 28-regime crosswalk + EU AI Act Annex IV conformity dossiers per high-risk system
AGI containment labs operational (T3/T4) with TLA+/Coq/Q# governance kernels + UMIF by 2027
Unified Meta-Invariant Framework (UMIF) governing all containment + governance invariants with multi-prover verification
CAS-SPP zero-knowledge systemic-compliance proofs issued to all 19 supervisory regulators by 2029
R-SGQL (Regulator-Scoped Streaming GQL) live for FCA + PRA + Fed + EU AI Office + MAS + HKMA by 2028
EAIP (Enterprise Agent Interoperability Protocol) supplanting ad-hoc agent integration by 2027
CRS-UUID lineage end-to-end across data, prompts, weights, decisions, attestations with 25y retention
GIEN telemetry + protocol federated with G-SIFI peers + AISIs + central banks by 2029
Quarterly Annex IV-style conformity dossiers auto-assembled by ARRE for all high-risk systems
Civilizational AGI readiness: CGI >=0.80 by 2030; GTI >=0.85 by 2030; RCI =1.0
doNot: Do NOT deploy any AI/AGI/ASI capability outside the UMIF + TLA+/Coq/Q#-verified governance kernel + Sentinel v2.4 attestation
Do NOT issue any regulator submission without CAS-SPP signature + zk-attestation + Annex IV dossier (where applicable)
Do NOT bypass EAIP for any cross-agent / cross-system integration; ad-hoc protocols are blocked at OPA admission
Do NOT operate AGI containment labs (T3/T4) without 3-of-5 quorum + kinetic override + 48h time-lock + AISI <=24h + EU AI Office <=15d + UMIF proof obligation
Do NOT process any data / prompt / weight / decision without CRS-UUID lineage emission to Kafka aigov.lineage + WORM

regimes: EU AI Act 2024/1689 + GPAI Art. 53/55 + Annex IV technical documentation
NIST AI RMF 1.0 + AI 600-1 Generative Profile
UK FCA Consumer Duty + PRA/FCA SS1/23 + SMCR SMF-AI
Global Trust Index + Trust Derivatives Layer

indices.UMIF-Coverage: >=1.0 (Unified Meta-Invariant Framework: all governance invariants under multi-prover verification)
indices.ZKSC-Coverage: >=0.95 (Zero-Knowledge Systemic-Compliance proofs across all material controls)
indices.CRS-Lineage: >=1.0 (CRS-UUID lineage emission rate across all governed events)
indices.AnnexIV-Coverage: >=1.0 (Annex IV dossiers for all high-risk systems)
indices.RSGQL-Coverage: >=0.95 of regulator queries served by R-SGQL by 2028

tiers.T0: Sandbox - isolated VPC, synthetic data, no network egress
tiers.T1: Staging - shadow mode, real data, no actuation
tiers.T3: Production - Nitro Enclaves / TDX / SEV-SNP + KMS + dual control + full audit + UMIF proof obligation
tiers.T4: Frontier Air-Gapped (AGI Containment Lab) - 3-of-5 quorum (CRO+CISO+CDAO+Board AI Chair+AISI rep) + kinetic override + 48h time-lock + AISI <=24h + EU AI Office <=15d + TLA+/Coq/Q+ UMIF proof per release

severities.SEV-0: Civilizational / systemic - AISI <=24h, EU AI Office <=15d, Board chair, public statement consideration
severities.SEV-1: Major - SEC 8-K <=4 BD, DORA <=4h, FCA <=72h, MAS <=24h

investment.envelope: USD 300-750M / 5y (G-SIFI tier master AGI-governance program including AGI containment labs + UMIF + R-SGQL + EAIP)
investment.NPV: USD 850-2200M (5y risk-adjusted, includes uplift from AGI containment lab + UMIF multi-prover + ZK systemic compliance + CRS-UUID lineage)
investment.uplift_vs_WP060: USD 50-100M envelope; USD 150-300M NPV from AGI containment labs + TLA+/Coq/Q# multi-prover + UMIF + ZK systemic-compliance proofs + EAIP + Annex IV automation
drivers: AGI containment labs (T3 + T4 air-gapped) construction + operational
Sentinel v2.4 + WorkflowAI Pro reference architecture rollout
Hub + GQL/sGQL + R-SGQL + ARRE + CAS-SPP + SR-DSL
EAIP standard authoring + reference implementation + agent registry

modules.title: Sentinel AI v2.4 + WorkflowAI Pro — Reference Architectures for G-SIFI
modules.purpose: Establish the dual reference architectures (Sentinel for safety/containment; WorkflowAI Pro for prompt/agent orchestration) jointly governing all AI workloads at G-SIFI scale.

sections.title: Sentinel v2.4 L1-L13 Stack — Layer Map
sections.description: Sentinel Enterprise reference stack: L1 hardware root-of-trust → L2 secure enclave/TEE → L3 PQC crypto plane → L4 Kafka WORM audit bus → L5 OPA/Rego policy plane → L6 governance kernel (TLA+/Coq/Q#) → L7 model registry + lineage → L8 inference plane (sidecars) → L9 containment plane (kill-switch, EAV, MGK) → L10 telemetry/GIEN → L11 Hub UI/API → L12 regulator gateway → L13 external attestation (ZK proofs).
controls: Each layer signs SBOM/SLSA into Kafka WORM

sections.title: WorkflowAI Pro L1-L7 Stack — Prompt & Agent Plane
sections.description: L1 prompt registry + versioning → L2 agent runtime (LangGraph/EAIP) → L3 tool/connector plane → L4 evaluation harness → L5 RAG/knowledge plane → L6 orchestration (workflows + SLOs) → L7 governance overlay (binds to Sentinel L5/L6/L8).
integrationPoints: WorkflowAI L2 agents wrapped by Sentinel L8 sidecars
All prompt versions hashed into Sentinel L4 WORM

sections.title: Shared Substrates — K8s, Kafka, OPA, PQC, ZK
substrates: Kubernetes multi-tenant with NetworkPolicies + admission control
ZK-SNARK prover farm for systemic-compliance proofs

sections.title: Reference Topology — Multi-Region, Multi-Tenant, Sovereign Failover
topology: 3 primary regions (EU, US, APAC) + 2 sovereign DR (CH, SG)
Active-active for inference; active-passive for governance kernel
QKD links between Hub and regulator gateways where available
All cross-region traffic signed + replicated to WORM

sections.title: Integration Contracts — Sentinel ↔ WorkflowAI Pro ↔ Hub ↔ Regulator
Performance, SLOs, and Capacity Envelope
slos: ZK proof generation p95 < 8 s for systemic-compliance bundles

sections.title: Reference Architecture Acceptance Criteria
acceptance: All 13 Sentinel layers + 7 WorkflowAI layers deployed across 3 regions
UMIF kernel attached and producing daily proofs

modules.title: Institutional AI Governance & Control Platform on K8s + Kafka + OPA
modules.purpose: Operationalize day-2 governance: sidecars, WORM audit, CI/CD policy gates, Hub UI/API, GitOps, GQL/sGQL for compliance monitoring.

sections.title: Sidecar Architecture — Per-Pod Policy Enforcement
sections.description: Every inference pod ships with Sentinel sidecar enforcing input/output OPA policies, redaction, rate-limits, jailbreak detection, and CRS-UUID lineage tagging before any token leaves the pod.

sections.title: Kafka WORM Audit Bus — PQC-Signed, Append-Only
sections.description: All governance events (PolicyDecision, ModelLoad, PromptVersionPublish, AgentRun, Override, RegulatorRead) written append-only to Kafka topics with PQC signatures + object-lock S3 tier-2 archive.
sections.retention: 7 years online, 10 years archive, regulator-readable via R-SGQL

sections.title: CI/CD Governance Gates
gates: Pre-merge: OPA policy diff review + UMIF invariant impact analysis
Pre-deploy: SBOM scan + SLSA L3 attestation + model card check
Post-deploy: canary with shadow traffic + GIEN baseline
Promote: signed approval (4-eyes) + Annex IV dossier delta written to WORM

sections.title: OPA/Rego Policy Plane — WASM-Compiled, Tiered
policyTiers: Tier-A (regulatory): EU AI Act, SR 11-7, GDPR — block on violation
Tier-B (institutional): risk appetite, sanctions, sovereignty — block
Tier-C (operational): cost, SLO, fairness drift — warn/throttle

sections.title: AI Governance Hub — UI + API + Regulator Portal
hubFeatures: Regulator portal (Annex IV dossier, R-SGQL, ARRE feeds)

sections.title: GitOps + Policy-as-Code Workflow
workflow: Policies in Git → PR → CI runs OPA tests + UMIF impact
Approved policies → signed bundle → OPA distribution
Rollback via tagged bundle + WORM evidence

sections.title: GQL / sGQL Governance Query Language
sections.description: GQL (synchronous) for ad-hoc supervisory queries; sGQL (streaming) for continuous compliance monitoring; both backed by Kafka WORM + lineage graph.
useCases: Show all GPAI uses of model X in EU jurisdiction in last 90 days
Stream fairness drift > 5pp across protected classes
Stream sanctioned-entity touchpoints in real time

sections.title: Operational Hardening — Zero-Trust, mTLS, Network Policies
controls: Workload identity bound to OPA decisions

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria for M2
acceptance: 100% of governance events in Kafka WORM
CI/CD gates blocking ≥99% of policy regressions
Hub adopted by 3+ control functions (Risk, Compliance, Audit)

modules.title: Multi-Framework Regulatory Compliance & Crosswalks + Annex IV Conformity
modules.purpose: Map institutional AI controls to 28 regulatory regimes; assemble Annex IV-style technical-documentation dossiers continuously and automatically.

sections.title: Crosswalk Methodology
sections.description: Each institutional control mapped to ≥1 clause across regimes; gaps surfaced; obligations decomposed to OPA-enforceable predicates and CAS-attestable evidence.

sections.title: Annex IV Dossier Assembler
sections.description: Continuous assembler builds Annex IV-style dossiers per high-risk system: intended purpose, data governance, technical documentation, monitoring, human oversight, accuracy/robustness/cybersecurity.
outputs: Live dossier per system in Hub
Diff report on each model/prompt change

sections.title: NIST AI RMF 1.0 + AI 600-1 Operationalization
sections.description: Govern/Map/Measure/Manage functions mapped to platform features; AI 600-1 GenAI profile addressed via Sentinel containment + GIEN telemetry.

sections.title: ISO/IEC 42001 AIMS — Certifiable Management System
controls: Context, leadership, planning, support, operation, evaluation, improvement

sections.title: Sector-Specific Banking/Insurance Overlays
overlays: Basel III/IV model use in IRB/IMM

sections.title: Regulator Engagement & Reporting Cadence
cadence: Quarterly Annex IV delta to lead regulator

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria for M3
acceptance: Zero open regulatory findings on AI controls for 4 consecutive quarters

modules.title: Sentinel Enterprise AI Governance & AGI Containment Stack
modules.purpose: Provide T0-T4 containment for frontier/AGI-class systems via AGI containment labs, TLA+/Coq/Q# governance kernels, UMIF, GIEN telemetry, CRS-UUID lineage, and global sanctions interlocks.

sections.title: Tiered Containment Model — T0 to T4
tiers: T3 — autonomous agents (multi-step) with kill-switch + GIEN
T4 — frontier/AGI-class systems in containment labs with TLA+/Coq/Q# proofs + UMIF + ZK attestation

sections.title: AGI Containment Labs — Physical R&D Facilities
sections.description: Air-gapped or one-way-diode physical labs for evaluating frontier capabilities: dangerous-capability evals, red-team rooms, secure compute with TEE attestation, no general-purpose egress.
facilityControls: Mandatory dual-control (2-person rule) for any model load
All sessions recorded to WORM with PQC + on-chain anchor

sections.title: TLA+/Coq/Q# Multi-Prover Governance Kernels
provers: TLA+ — temporal invariants on governance protocols (no override without 4-eyes + WORM)
Coq — functional correctness of OPA policy compiler + lineage graph
kernelOutputs: Daily proof bundle signed + written to WORM

sections.title: Unified Meta-Invariant Framework (UMIF)
sections.description: UMIF aggregates invariants across TLA+, Coq, Q# and runtime predicates into a single coverage manifold; each governance-critical property must have ≥1 prover binding.
invariantClasses: Authority (no AI authorizes funds-movement without human)
Containment (no T4 model emits to T0-T2 plane)

sections.title: GIEN — Governance Inference Event Network Telemetry
sections.description: Real-time telemetry stream of inference-level governance events; feeds fairness drift, jailbreak rate, sanctions-touch rate, capability emergence indicators.

sections.title: CRS-UUID Cryptographic Resource Stewardship Lineage
sections.description: Every resource (model weights, prompt, dataset, agent run, tool invocation, output) tagged with a Cryptographic-Resource-Stewardship UUID linked into a Merkle DAG; lineage is reproducible and ZK-verifiable.
properties: Linked into DAG with parent CRS-UUIDs
Anchored daily into Kafka WORM + optional public anchor

sections.title: Emergency Auxiliary Vault (EAV) & Master Governance Kill-Switch (MGK)
sections.description: EAV holds encrypted snapshots of governance state; MGK enables global pause of T3/T4 with TLA+-proven liveness/safety; both require multi-party authorization.
controls: Activation logged to WORM + regulator gateway

sections.title: Global Sanctions & Export-Control Interlocks
controls: OFAC/EU/UK sanctions screening at inference time
Dual-use/export-control checks for model weights movement
Sanctioned-entity touchpoint streamed to Hub via sGQL

sections.title: Frontier/AGI Readiness Drills
drills: Annual: full T4 lab shutdown + recovery
All drills produce evidence pack written to WORM

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria for M4
acceptance: MGK exercised quarterly with proof bundle

modules.title: Regulator-Grade Supervisory & Reporting Stack — R-SGQL + CAS-SPP + SR-DSL + Annex IV Dossiers
modules.purpose: Equip supervisors with verification-based AI oversight: regulator-scoped streaming GQL (R-SGQL), automated regulator reporting engine (ARRE), CAS/CAS-SPP cryptographic supervisory proofs, SR-DSL, and continuous Annex IV-style conformity dossiers.

sections.title: AI Governance Hub — Regulator Workspace
sections.description: Dedicated regulator workspace inside the Hub with scoped views, dossier viewer, R-SGQL console, ARRE feed catalog, override audit trail, and ZK proof verifier.
features: Read-only by default with break-glass write for joint exams
All regulator reads logged to WORM

sections.title: GQL → sGQL → R-SGQL Evolution
sections.description: GQL: ad-hoc supervisory queries. sGQL: streaming compliance monitoring. R-SGQL: regulator-scoped streaming GQL with hard tenancy boundaries, query approval workflow, and ZK-redacted result attestation.

sections.title: Automated Regulator Reporting Engine (ARRE)
sections.description: ARRE composes scheduled and ad-hoc regulator reports (monthly fairness, quarterly Annex IV delta, annual AIMS attestation) from WORM evidence, signs them with PQC, and routes via regulator gateway.

sections.title: Verification-Based AI Supervision
sections.description: Shift from sample-based to verification-based supervision: supervisor verifies cryptographic proofs (CAS/CAS-SPP) and UMIF/ZK attestations instead of re-running computations.

sections.title: CAS & CAS-SPP Cryptographic Proof Protocols
sections.description: CAS: per-decision attestation that policy_i evaluated to allow/deny with hash(model,prompt,policy,context). CAS-SPP: aggregated systemic proofs over policy populations (e.g., aggregate fairness, aggregate sanctions hit-rate) with ZK redaction.

sections.title: SR-DSL — Supervisory Reporting DSL
sections.description: Declarative DSL for supervisors to express reporting requirements (cadence, fields, redaction, signing); compiled to R-SGQL queries + ARRE schedules + Annex IV slots.
sections.example: report fairness_monthly { cadence: monthly; scope: high-risk(EU); fields: [auc,dem_parity,eq_odds]; redact: customer_id; sign: PQC; }

sections.title: ZK Systemic-Compliance Proofs
sections.description: Zero-knowledge proofs over aggregated WORM evidence that demonstrate systemic properties (e.g., 100% of high-risk decisions had human-in-the-loop) without revealing individual records.

sections.title: Annex IV-Style Conformity Dossier — Continuous Assembly
sections.description: Per-system dossier assembled continuously from WORM, model registry, prompt registry, and evaluation harness; rendered on demand to regulator-scoped PDF + JSON.

sections.title: Regulator Gateway — Secure Inbound/Outbound
sections.description: Hardened gateway exposing R-SGQL, ARRE feeds, dossier endpoints, ZK verifier; mTLS + supervisor PKI + WORM logging on every interaction.

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria for M5
acceptance: CAS-SPP proofs verified offline by ≥2 supervisors
Annex IV dossier auto-assembly for 100% of high-risk systems

modules.title: Enterprise AI Strategy + Prompt Management + EAIP + Autonomous Agents
modules.purpose: Couple governance with business value: enterprise AI strategy, prompt management product, agent interoperability via EAIP, WorkflowAI-style orchestration, autonomous-agent operating model.

sections.title: Enterprise AI Strategy 2026-2030
pillars: Capital efficiency via better model risk

sections.title: Prompt Management & Reporting Application
features: Prompt registry with versioning, ownership, evaluations
Approval workflow with 4-eyes for high-risk prompts
Linked to model cards + Annex IV dossier

sections.title: EAIP — Enterprise Agent Interoperability Protocol
sections.description: Open-style protocol for cross-vendor agent interop: capability discovery, signed tool invocations, policy-aware delegation, lineage propagation (CRS-UUID), audit emission.

sections.title: WorkflowAI-Style Orchestration
features: Inline OPA gates + UMIF impact preview

sections.title: Autonomous Agent Operating Model
sections.description: Tiered autonomy: A0 read-only → A1 read+suggest → A2 read+write under approval → A3 read+write autonomous with monetary/scope limits → A4 cross-domain autonomous in containment.
controls: A2+ requires CAS attestation per write
A4 only in containment labs (T4 binding)

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria for M6
acceptance: EAIP-Adoption ≥0.95 across internal + key vendors by 2028
Prompt registry covers 100% of production prompts
Autonomous agent operating model published + audited

modules.title: Phased 2026-2030 Implementation Roadmap
modules.purpose: Sequenced delivery plan from 2026 platform foundations to 2030 frontier-AGI readiness, with milestones, KPIs, gates, and investment tranches.

sections.title: Phase 0 — 2026 H1: Foundations
milestones: Sentinel L1-L8 + Kafka WORM + OPA in 2 regions

sections.title: Phase 1 — 2026 H2: Containment Tiers T0-T2
milestones: Containment T0-T2 across all production AI

sections.title: Phase 2 — 2027 H1: Multi-Framework Compliance + Annex IV
milestones: Annex IV auto-dossier for high-risk systems

sections.title: Phase 3 — 2027 H2: T3 Autonomous Agents + EAIP
milestones: CAS-SPP systemic proofs for fairness + sanctions

sections.title: Phase 4 — 2028 H1: AGI Containment Labs Stand-up
Cumulative Investment & NPV
sections.uplift: +USD 50-100M envelope vs WP-060; +USD 150-300M NPV vs WP-060

sections.title: Roadmap Gates & Stop-Loss
gates: Phase advance requires UMIF-Coverage delta + audit sign-off
Stop-loss: any T4 containment failure pauses all phases

modules.title: Systemic-Risk Controls + Civilizational AGI Readiness Best Practices
modules.purpose: Beyond institutional governance: systemic-risk controls across G-SIFIs and civilizational readiness for AGI-class capabilities — cross-institution mutual aid, sovereign failover, public-interest safeguards.

sections.title: Public-Interest Safeguards
practices: Public-good carve-outs (e.g., fraud detection telemetry sharing)
Transparency reports on aggregate AI use

sections.title: Frontier-AGI Civilizational Safeguards
practices: No T4 deployment without independent oversight
International coordination with peer G-SIFIs + regulators

refArchLayers.description: HSM + TPM + TEE root-of-trust per node

containmentMechanisms.description: Optional public anchor for T4 evidence

umifInvariants.invariant: Kill-switch reachable from any governance state within bounded steps
No policy decision without WORM audit emission
OPA decision latency bounded p99 < 5 ms
OPA policy compiler is sound w.r.t. Rego semantics
CRS-UUID lineage DAG is acyclic + reproducible
ZK redaction function preserves no extra information
Dilithium/Kyber/SPHINCS+ protocol composition is IND-CCA-secure under PQ assumptions
AI never authorizes funds movement above threshold without human
T4 model emissions never reach T0-T2 plane
MGK activation drains all T3/T4 inference within bounded steps
Sanctions interlock is mandatorily evaluated before any external tool call
Annex IV dossier assembler is complete w.r.t. mandatory sections
CAS attestation hash binds (model, prompt, policy, context, decision) immutably
R-SGQL projection respects tenant boundary under Rego pre-filter

supervisoryLayers.description: Regulator-scoped streaming GQL w/ ZK redaction

strategyItems.item: Better IRB/IMM model use under Basel
Hub as enterprise system of record

roadmapItems.milestone: NIST AI RMF 1.0 + AI 600-1 fully mapped

systemicPractices.practice: AI incident sharing via FS-ISAC-style ISAC

dependencies.to: WP-061 M3 Annex IV Live Dossier

rego_examples:
package gov.sanctions
deny if { input.tool.target in data.sanctions.list }
sr_dsl_examples: report fairness_monthly { cadence: monthly; scope: high-risk(EU); fields: [auc,dem_parity,eq_odds]; redact: customer_id; sign: PQC }
report annex_iv_delta { cadence: on_change; scope: all-high-risk; fields: [sections,attestations]; sign: PQC; attach: ZK }
tla_skeletons:
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences
VARIABLES state, audit
Init == state = "Idle" /\ audit = <<>>
Next == \/ Decide \/ MGKActivate \/ Override
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state,audit>>
coq_skeletons: Theorem rego_compiler_sound : forall (p:Policy) (i:Input), denot p i = wasm_eval (compile p) i. Proof. (* ... *) Qed.
qsharp_skeletons: operation QKDKey() : Result[] { /* BB84-style protocol with parameter estimation */ ... }

riskControlMatrix.control: T4 AGI containment lab + UMIF + MGK
Rego pre-filter + ZK redaction + Coq proof

riskControlMatrix.risk: Concentration risk on single model vendor

dataFlows.flow: Inference request → Sidecar OPA → Model → Output OPA → Sidecar audit → Kafka WORM
WORM event → GIEN telemetry → sGQL stream → Hub dashboard + Regulator R-SGQL
Model/Prompt change → CI gate → SBOM/SLSA → Annex IV delta → Dossier update + ARRE filing
T4 lab session → Faraday-isolated compute → TLA+/Coq/Q# proof → Diode telemetry → WORM + ZK anchor
Regulator query → Gateway → R-SGQL → Rego pre-filter → ZK redaction → Result + CAS proof
MGK trigger → TLA+ liveness proof → T3/T4 drain → Hub alert → Regulator notify

rollout90.task: Project mobilization + sponsor sign-off + risk-tier inventory
Foundation stand-up (K8s + Kafka WORM + OPA bundle v1)
Sidecar deployment in 2 priority workloads + Hub MVP
UMIF v0 TLA+ kernel + initial invariants (UI-01..UI-04)
Regulator demo + KPI dashboard live + plan Phase 1

roadmap.milestone: NIST AI RMF 1.0 + AI 600-1 fully mapped

evidencePack: AGI containment lab session records (WORM + optional on-chain anchor)

executiveSummary.headline: WP-061 establishes a comprehensive 2026-2030 master blueprint for G-SIFI AGI/ASI governance combining Sentinel v2.4 + WorkflowAI Pro reference architectures, AGI containment labs with TLA+/Coq/Q# multi-prover kernels and UMIF, multi-framework compliance with Annex IV auto-dossiers, regulator-grade verification-based supervision (R-SGQL + CAS-SPP + SR-DSL + ZK systemic-compliance proofs), and civilizational-readiness systemic-risk controls.
executiveSummary.scope: 8 modules, 22 regulatory crosswalks, 17 UMIF invariants across TLA+/Coq/Q#, 16 containment mechanisms (T0-T4), 18 supervisory layers, 15 Annex IV artifacts, 19 strategy items, 22 roadmap items across 8 phases (2026-2030), 18 systemic practices, 13 dependencies.
executiveSummary.investment: USD 300-750M over 5 years; NPV USD 850-2200M cumulative by 2030 (+USD 50-100M envelope and +USD 150-300M NPV vs WP-060).
executiveSummary.targetIndices: UMIF-Coverage ≥1.0; ZKSC-Coverage ≥0.95; CRS-Lineage ≥1.0; EAIP-Adoption ≥0.95 by 2028; AnnexIV-Coverage ≥1.0; CGI ≥0.80 by 2030; GTI ≥0.85; RCI =1.0.
differentiators: TLA+/Coq/Q# multi-prover governance kernels unified by UMIF
CRS-UUID Cryptographic Resource Stewardship lineage DAG
